diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -2,18 +2,69 @@
 import torch.nn as nn

 

 class DKT(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=128, hidden_dim=128):

+    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=2, dropout=0.2):

         super().__init__()

         self.num_skills = num_skills

         self.interaction_emb = nn.Embedding(2 * num_skills, embed_dim)

-        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(embed_dim, hidden_dim, batch_first=True)

+        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(embed_dim, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=dropout)

         self.out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)

+        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

         

     def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects):

-        # skill_ids: [B, T]

-        # corrects: [B, T]

         interactions = skill_ids + corrects * self.num_skills

         x = self.interaction_emb(interactions)

+        x = self.dropout(x)

         h, _ = self.lstm(x)

+        h = self.dropout(h)

         logits = self.out(h) # [B, T, num_skills]

         return logits

+

+class SAKT(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, num_heads=8, dropout=0.2, max_len=20000):

+        super().__init__()

+        self.num_skills = num_skills

+        self.embed_dim = embed_dim

+        

+        self.interaction_emb = nn.Embedding(2 * num_skills, embed_dim)

+        self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)

+        self.pos_emb = nn.Embedding(max_len, embed_dim)

+        

+        self.attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(embed_dim, num_heads, dropout=dropout, batch_first=True)

+        self.layer_norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(embed_dim)

+        self.layer_norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(embed_dim)

+        

+        self.ffn = nn.Sequential(

+            nn.Linear(embed_dim, embed_dim),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Dropout(dropout),

+            nn.Linear(embed_dim, embed_dim),

+            nn.Dropout(dropout)

+        )

+        

+        self.out = nn.Linear(embed_dim, 1)

+        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

+        

+    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, next_skills):

+        B, T = skill_ids.shape

+        

+        interactions = skill_ids + corrects * self.num_skills

+        

+        interaction_embeds = self.interaction_emb(interactions)

+        query_embeds = self.skill_emb(next_skills)

+        

+        pos_interactions = torch.arange(T, device=skill_ids.device).unsqueeze(0).expand(B, T)

+        pos_queries = torch.arange(1, T+1, device=skill_ids.device).unsqueeze(0).expand(B, T)

+        

+        interaction_embeds = interaction_embeds + self.pos_emb(pos_interactions)

+        query_embeds = query_embeds + self.pos_emb(pos_queries)

+        

+        mask = torch.triu(torch.ones(T, T, device=skill_ids.device), diagonal=1).bool()

+        

+        attn_out, _ = self.attn(query_embeds, interaction_embeds, interaction_embeds, attn_mask=mask)

+        

+        x = self.layer_norm1(query_embeds + self.dropout(attn_out))

+        ffn_out = self.ffn(x)

+        x = self.layer_norm2(x + ffn_out)

+        

+        logits = self.out(x).squeeze(-1) # [B, T]

+        return logits

     device = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')

-    model = DKT(num_skills).to(device)

+

+        

     model.load_state_dict(checkpoint['model_state_dict'])

     model.eval()

     

@@ -34,10 +40,13 @@
             b_corrects = corrects[i:i+batch_size].to(device)

             b_lengths = lengths[i:i+batch_size].to(device)

             

-            logits = model(b_skills[:, :-1], b_corrects[:, :-1])

             next_skills = b_skills[:, 1:]

             

-            gathered_logits = torch.gather(logits, 2, next_skills.unsqueeze(-1)).squeeze(-1)

+            if model_type == 'DKT':

+                logits = model(b_skills[:, :-1], b_corrects[:, :-1])

+                gathered_logits = torch.gather(logits, 2, next_skills.unsqueeze(-1)).squeeze(-1)

+            else:

             T = b_skills.shape[1]

             mask = torch.arange(T - 1, device=device).unsqueeze(0) < (b_lengths.unsqueeze(1) - 1)
